prestazioni: 2ZZ-GE (1st Gen, 2004-2006) forced-induction build with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 18 psi mapping on 93 octane fuel with E85 flex-fuel capability via AEM 30-0300 wideband controller

Full Tomei 264°/256° camshafts with adjustable vernier pulleys, ACL Race Series bearings, and a custom 3-core Koyorad aluminum radiator with dual 10-inch SPAL fans for thermal management under sustained high-RPM operation

Custom 6-speed manual transmission reinforcement using a PPG close-ratio gearset (2.36, 1.61, 1.21, 1.00, 0.86, 0.73) paired with a Fidanza 8.5 lb aluminum flywheel and OS Giken twin-disc clutch for 2ZZ-GE torque capacity up to 300 lb-ft

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo with 70mm titanium tips, equal-length 4-2-1 headers, and a custom 2.5-inch resonator delete for optimal scavenging on the 2ZZ-GE's high-revving nature
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (2004-2006 specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, extended bolt-on flares, and a 3-piece front splitter with integrated canards for aggressive stance on 18x9.5 +15 and 18x10.5 +25 Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels

Custom JDM-spec Toyota bB (xB predecessor) front bumper lip with integrated LED fog lights and a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a 3-inch cowl scoop for the Koyorad radiator setup, painted in Toyota Super White II (040) with matte black accents

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (xB-specific mounting brackets), custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (bolt-in 6-point with harness bar), and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay with integrated AEM X-Series digital gauges (boost, AFR, oil pressure, and water temp)
